title: Billions of dollars in research and development getting spent right now to build better UIs using AI.

content.summary: Billions of dollars in research and development getting spent right now to build better UIs using AI. Atai Barkai (@ataiiam) Introducing Shadify: Generative UI built on ShadCN Simply describe a UI and watch your @LangChain agent compose from @ShadCN on the fly, using AG-UI and @CopilotKit . Then export it as React code. Repo below. Try it out here: shadify.copilotkit.ai Video — https://nitter.net/ataiiam/status/2035728142095339677#m
